text: Introducing Lyssen, the first AI customer researcher.
Lyssen speaks to thousands of people per week
and tells you exactly what they want and why.
Here's how it works.
I want to find out what marketers think about our website.
With this prompt, Lyssen creates a discussion guide.
Lyssen then taps into our network of millions of users
to find the perfect people to interview.
Within seconds, Lyssen starts hundreds of conversations
in parallel.
What do you think about this site?
Looks cool.
What's cool about it?
I mean, having an AI that can help you go through...
In one hour, Lyssen has done thousands of interviews
and turns them into an executive summary,
common themes, standout quotes,
video highlight reels, and even slides.
Canva's Lyssen
Iconic brands like Microsoft, Canva, and Shabeez
already use Lyssen to make their most important decisions faster.
We raised $27 million from Sequoia
to make every company's customer obsessed.
Comment Lyssen and we'll give you access
and $1,000 worth of Lyssen credits.
